title: VimFu — zs ze Horizontal Scroll
description: zs scrolls the screen so the cursor is at the left edge. ze scrolls so the cursor is at the right edge. Only works with nowrap.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with long lines

setup.content:
# Wide Lines
result = calculate_damage(base_attack, defense_rating, critical_multiplier, elemental_bonus, armor_penetration)
player_stats = {"health": 100, "mana": 50, "stamina": 75, "strength": 20, "dexterity": 15, "intelligence": 18}
short = 1

steps.say: Z S and Z E scroll horizontally. Z S puts the cursor at the left edge. Z E puts it at the right edge. You need no wrap set.

steps.comment: --- Demo: jump into middle of long line, zs then ze ---

steps.say: Line two is very long. Search for the word critical right in the middle.
Cursor is in the middle of the line. Now Z S puts it at the left edge.
Everything to the right of the cursor is now visible --- the rest of the call we couldn't see before.
Z E puts the cursor at the right edge instead.
Cursor at the right edge. We can see what came before --- the start of the call.
Z S and Z E. Horizontal scroll anchoring. Z S cursor at left. Z E cursor at right. Only useful with no wrap.
